headline: China cuts Iranian oil purchases by 40%, Bessentsays
summary: Investing.com -- U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Tuesday that China has reduced its crude oil purchases by approximately 40% in recent months, a decline he said is significantly reducing Iran's oil revenues.

raw.headline: China cuts Iranian oil purchases by 40%, Bessentsays
raw.summary: Investing.com -- U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Tuesday that China has reduced its crude oil purchases by approximately 40% in recent months, a decline he said is significantly reducing Iran's oil revenues.

headline: Organic Traditions Closes $10.5M USD Series A Funding Round
summary: Organic Traditions, the family-founded Canadian superfood brand making functional wellness simple, announced today the close of a $10.5M Series A funding round ($15M CAD). The round was backed by a group of strategic angel investors with deep experience in consumer packaged goods, retail, technology, and operations, including executives and operators from FreshPet, Shopify, City National Bank, Frito-Lay, and Colgate-Palmolive.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Colgate-Palmolive, Raises Price Target to $87
summary: Barclays  analyst Lauren Lieberman   maintains Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $80 to $87.
